subject: Re: crash during subtomo export
body:
hi Dimitry,

thank you!  Pixel size did the trick.   

best,

Jesse

On Tuesday, October 26, 2021 at 11:43:37 AM UTC-7 teg...@gmail.com wrote:

> Hi,
>
> Your issue seems related to this: 
> https://groups.google.com/g/warp-em/c/nqD-8-WQkTc/m/SSavkE3BAgAJ
>
> Does it go away when you switch to using CPU in the sub-tomo export 
> dialog, or increase the export pixel size?
>
> Cheers,
> Dimitry
>
> On Tuesday, October 26, 2021 at 8:14:31 PM UTC+2 mrJ wrote:
>
>> hi,
>>
>> exporting subtomo reconstructions and got the error below.   Thanks in 
>> advance!
>>
>>
>> System.Exception: System.Exception: cudaErrorMemoryAllocation
